description: Declarative build contract: defines required/optional files for each build mode

sources.notes: Single canonical source for all processed/computed game and manifest files. Build script copies from here only—no fallback logic.

app.description: Production Sankey viewer and analytics surfaces

required_static_files.data/games_manifest.json: Powers game discovery in game-explorer.html dropdown
required_static_files.data/elo_multiseason.json: Time-series Elo ratings for elo.html and rankings

required_per_game_files.data/multi_drilldown_real_data_E*.json: Core Sankey graph, shot locations, efficiency—every game needs this

additional_required_per_game_files.data/raw/raw_pts_E*.json: Per-game score timeline feed required for embedded cone chart under Sankey

optional_files.data/multi_drilldown_real_data_E*_auto.j: Auto-generated game insights (opt-in via query param)

optional_asset_globs.data/raw/raw_pts_*.json: Score timeline artifacts for score-diff pages

additional_required_per_game_files.data/raw/raw_box_E*.json: Box score details for shot-style-map drilling + consistency analysis

optional_asset_globs.data/raw/raw_box_*.json: Lab box score payloads for shot-map and consistency labs

notes: All required_per_game_files must exist for all games in games_manifest.json
optional_files will be copied if they exist; missing optional files do not fail the build
processed_data_dir is the single source of truth—build never falls back to other locations
Pipeline (entrypoint.py) must output to the canonical processed_data_dir
